---
title: "STAT460 Logistic Regression Analysis"
author: "Beast"
date: "2026-04-21"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    number_sections: false
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: false
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
subtitle: Dalton & Madilin Super Document 2
mainfont: TimesNewRoman
sansfont: TimesNewRoman
monofont: TimesNewRoman
---

# Load Relevant R Libraries

```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rmarkdown); library(knitr); library(moments);library(mdsr) 
library(scatterplot3d); library(corrplot); library(pso);library(usethis)
library(psych); library(GPArotation); library(lavaan);library(here)
library(haven);library(tidyverse);library(tidyverse);library(ggplot2)
```

# Importing

```{r}
NHANES2011 <- read_xpt("NHANES2011.xpt")
NHANES2013 <- read_xpt("NHANES2013.xpt") 
NHANES2015 <- read_xpt("NHANES2015.xpt") 
NHANES2017 <- read_xpt("NHANES2017.xpt") 
NHANES2021 <- read_xpt("NHANES2021.xpt") 
NHANESP2017 <- read_xpt("NHANESP2017.xpt") 
```

# Table Building

```{r}
## 2017 Table
PFAsVars2017 <- NHANES2017 |>
  select("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", # Individual and age/ethnicity
         "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST",  # Body measurement
         "INDFMPIR", # Economic status
         # Blood
         "BPXSY1", "BPXSY2", "BPXSY3", "BPXSY4",
         "BPXDI1", "BPXDI2", "BPXDI3", "BPXDI4", 
         "BPQ020",
         
         # Chol
         "LBXTC", "LBDHDD",
         
         "LBXPFHS", "LBXPFNA", "LBXBFOA", "LBXMFOS", "LBXNFOA", #PFAs
         
         # Medical Questions
         "MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", "MCQ160O", # Respiratory & IMMUNE
         "DIQ010", "DIQ160", # METABOLIC
         "MCQ160M", "MCQ160L", "MCQ500", # Endo/Liver
         "MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F", # Cardiovascular
         
         # Possible Other Confounders
         "SMQ020", "SMQ040", "PAQ605", "PAQ650", "PAQ655", "PAQ665"
         ) |> 
  filter(RIDAGEYR >= 12 & RIDAGEYR <= 75) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFHS = log(LBXPFHS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFNA = log(LBXPFNA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXBFOA = log(LBXBFOA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXMFOS = log(LBXMFOS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXNFOA = log(LBXNFOA)) |>
  mutate(
    SBP = rowMeans(across(BPXSY1:BPXSY4), na.rm = TRUE),
    DBP = rowMeans(across(BPXDI1:BPXDI4), na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  filter(!is.na(LBXPFHS))

PFAident <- c("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST", "INDFMPIR")
PFAlist <- c("LBXPFHS", "LBXPFNA", "LBXBFOA", "LBXMFOS", "LBXNFOA")
PFARespQs <- c("MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", "MCQ160O")
PFAMetaQs <- c("DIQ010", "DIQ160")
PFAEndoQs <- c("MCQ160M", "MCQ160L", "MCQ500")
PFACardQs <- c("MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F")

# 2015 Table
PFAsTotal2015 <- NHANES2015 |>
  select("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", # Individual and age/ethnicity
         "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST",  # Body measurement
         "LBXPFHS", "LBXPFNA", "LBXBFOA", "LBXMFOS", "LBXNFOA", #PFAs
         # Medical Questions
         "MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", "MCQ160O", # Respiratory & IMMUNE
         "DIQ010", "DIQ160", # METABOLIC
         "MCQ160M", "MCQ160L", # Endo/Liver
         "MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F" # Cardiovascular
         ) |> 
  filter(RIDAGEYR >= 12 & RIDAGEYR <= 75) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFHS = log(LBXPFHS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFNA = log(LBXPFNA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXBFOA = log(LBXBFOA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXMFOS = log(LBXMFOS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXNFOA = log(LBXNFOA)) |>
  filter(!is.na(LBXPFHS))

PFAident2015 <- c("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST")
PFAlist2015 <- c("LBXPFHS", "LBXPFNA", "LBXBFOA", "LBXMFOS", "LBXNFOA")
PFARespQs2015 <- c("MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", "MCQ160O")
PFAMetaQs2015 <- c("DIQ010", "DIQ160")
PFAEndoQs2015 <- c("MCQ160M", "MCQ160L")
PFACardQs2015 <- c("MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F")


# 2013 Table
PFAsTotal2013 <- NHANES2013 |>
  select("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", # Individual and age/ethnicity
         "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST",  # Body measurement
         "SSPFHS", "SSPFNA", "SSBFOA", "SSMFOS", "SSNFOS", #PFAs
         # Medical Questions
         "MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", "MCQ160O", # Respiratory & IMMUNE
         "DIQ010", "DIQ160", # METABOLIC
         "MCQ160M", "MCQ160L", # Endo/Liver
         "MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F" # Cardiovascular
         ) |> 
  filter(RIDAGEYR >= 12 & RIDAGEYR <= 75) |>
  mutate(logSSPFHS = log(SSPFHS)) |>
  mutate(logSSPFNA = log(SSPFNA)) |>
  mutate(logSSBFOA = log(SSBFOA)) |>
  mutate(logSSMFOS = log(SSMFOS)) |>
  mutate(logSSNFOS = log(SSNFOS)) |>
  filter(!is.na(SSPFHS))

PFAident2013 <- c("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST")
PFAlist2013 <- c("SSPFHS", "SSPFNA", "SSBFOA", "SSMFOS", "SSNFOS")
PFARespQs2013 <- c("MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", "MCQ160O")
PFAMetaQs2013 <- c("DIQ010", "DIQ160")
PFAEndoQs2013 <- c("MCQ160M", "MCQ160L")
PFACardQs2013 <- c("MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F")


# 2011 Table Building
PFAsTotal2011 <- NHANES2011 |>
  select("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", # Individual and age/ethnicity
         "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST",  # Body measurement
         "LBXPFHS", "LBXPFNA", "LBXPFOA", "LBXPFOS", #PFAs
         # Medical Questions
         "MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", # Respiratory & IMMUNE
         "DIQ010", "DIQ160", # METABOLIC
         "MCQ160M", "MCQ160L", # Endo/Liver
         "MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F" # Cardiovascular
         ) |> 
  filter(RIDAGEYR >= 12 & RIDAGEYR <= 75) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFHS = log(LBXPFHS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFNA = log(LBXPFNA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFOA = log(LBXPFOA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFOS = log(LBXPFOS)) |>
  filter(!is.na(LBXPFHS))

PFAident2011 <- c("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST")
PFAlist2011 <- c("LBXPFHS", "LBXPFNA", "LBXPFOA", "LBXPFOS")
PFARespQs2011 <- c("MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K")
PFAMetaQs2011 <- c("DIQ010", "DIQ160")
PFAEndoQs2011 <- c("MCQ160M", "MCQ160L")
PFACardQs2011 <- c("MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F")
```

# Logistic Regression Models

## 2011

### 

```{r}
# 2011  
```

## 2013

```{r}
# 2013 Logistic 
```

## 2015

```{r}
# 2015 Logistic 
```

## 2017

```{r}
# 2017 Logistic 
```
